steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank comes between “Though it was designated as mission” (a dependent clause introduced by Though) and “mission was actually the forty-sixth flight” (an independent clause with subject and verb).

steps.title: Apply the rule to the choices
steps.content: A comma separates a dependent clause from a following independent clause, and choice A correctly uses one after STS-45 to join these two parts. The other choices violate this rule: B adds an unnecessary conjunction (and), C uses a period which creates a sentence fragment, and D omits punctuation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
